query:
INSERT INTO riskAccounts (accountName, riskLevel, regularity, description, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES 
('普奕红', 'high', 100, '疑似还款帐号 - 初始数据库记录', NOW(), NOW()),
('夏志华', 'high', 100, '疑似还款帐号 - 初始数据库记录', NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updatedAt = NOW();
